name: CADint
description: A leading worldwide supplier of CAD/CAE PCB design software based in Elk Grove, CA. Over 25,000 users worldwide. Offers schematic capture, multi-layer PCB layout, 3D visualization, and Gerber/drill output.

_notes.https: HTTPS not available — site serves HTTP only (connection refused on port 443)
